description_long: This object depicts a small residential compound consisting of several detached houses and outbuildings arranged on a rectangular grassy plot. The main house is a two-story structure with a brown gable roof, white exterior walls, and multiple windows, accompanied by a covered porch supported by columns. Surrounding the main house are several smaller buildings, including garages, sheds, and a cylindrical silo, each with distinct roof shapes and sizes. The property is bordered by a paved road on one side, with a driveway leading to the main house and garages. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, and the roofs are predominantly gabled with some shed and curved forms. The overall layout suggests a suburban or semi-rural residential setting with ample open yard space.
description: A cluster of detached houses and outbuildings with brown gable roofs and white walls, set on a grassy rectangular plot with a paved road and driveway.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the property from an angled aerial perspective, highlighting the main house, outbuildings, and the driveway connecting to the road.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a direct street-facing view, emphasizing the front porches, entryways, and the alignment of the houses along the road.
description_view_2: View 2 offers a rear-side perspective, revealing the backyards, secondary entrances, and the arrangement of outbuildings behind the main house.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the property from the opposite end of the road, focusing on the rear facades and the open grassy area in the foreground.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, steps leading to main door, and simple decorative trim
